postReview.title: Bellamy lauds Wales' control in comfortable Liechtenstein win
postReview.description: Wales stayed top of Group J after a comfortable 3-0 victory over Liechtenstein in Cardiff in World Cup qualifying on Friday.

QAData.question: Who won between Wales and Liechtenstein on Fri, 06 Jun 2025 18:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Wales won 3–0 over Liechtenstein on Fri, 06 Jun 2025 18:45:00 GMT.
